description_long: This handbag features a rectangular, slightly tapered body with a light beige, horizontally striped fabric exterior. The corners and base are reinforced with tan leather or faux leather patches, adding both durability and a stylish accent. A gold-toned zipper runs along the top edge, with a matching tan leather zipper pull for easy access. The overall design is minimalist, with no visible external pockets or embellishments except for a small, subtle brand patch on one side. The bag appears to be medium-sized, suitable for carrying personal items such as cosmetics, small electronics, or daily essentials. The construction suggests a soft, flexible structure with a semi-soft surface finish.
description: A medium-sized, rectangular handbag with a beige striped fabric body, tan leather accents, and a gold zipper closure. Minimalist design with a subtle brand patch and no external decorations.
description_view_0: Front view showing the beige striped fabric body and tan leather corner reinforcements, with the zipper and pull visible at the top.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the slim profile, tan leather base, and the zipper running along the top edge with the zipper pull extended.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the same striped fabric and tan leather corners, with a small brand patch centered near the top.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the slim profile and zipper, similar to view 1 but from the other side.
attribute_brand_logo: A small, rectangular patch on the back side near the top center, with subtle text; no prominent logo.
attribute_strap_type: Single short zipper pull strap, not intended for carrying; no shoulder or crossbody straps visible.
attribute_closure_mechanism: Gold-toned zipper closure running along the top edge, with a tan leather zipper pull.
attribute_pattern: Horizontal beige stripes on a light background.
